creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://lists.freebsd.org/subscription/freebsd-ports> refers to: 

<https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-ports-announce/>

> This mailing list hasn't received yet any mail since its migration, 
> in 3 seconds you will be redirected to its mailman's archives

<https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports-announce> is 404, not found. 

----

As far as I can tell, the list does exist; an attempt to subscribe resulted in: 

> Hi, this is the Mlmmj program managing the
> <freebsd-ports-announce@…> mailing list.
> 
> You were unable to be subscribed to the list because you are already
> subscribed.
